name: add-community-extension
tagline: Turns a GitHub extension-submission issue into a validated entry in the Spec Kit community catalog and opens a PR.
verdict: Clear, deterministic, well-scoped process with concrete git/PR steps, a solid add-vs-update path, and consistent file targets. Main gaps: no stated behavior when a validation check fails (private repo, missing LICENSE, unchecked box), and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No guidance anywhere for validation failures (private repo, missing LICENSE/manifest, unchecked box) or issue/repo fetch errors.
python3 (and implicit gh/GitHub PR access) used without any upfront requirements or availability check.
No version field or changelog anywhere in frontmatter or body.
